oneOf.description: Always unlocks the item when the specified context is met.
Unlocks the item the first time the player enters the water.
Player has more than 10 items in their inventory.

context.description: The context in which the recipe is unlocked.

item.description: The item that must be obtained to unlock this recipe.

tag.description: An item tag that matches multiple items that can be obtained to unlock this recipe.

data.description: The item data/aux value for items with variants.
